summary: The protagonist gathers a group of associates to organize a plan for the 6th main scenario, tasking them with exploring and mapping the Balter Mountains in exchange for information on the final goal. Meanwhile, he consults with an ally about recruiting a new candidate for his upcoming 'Alley Boss Academy' project. Despite initial skepticism regarding the rarity and utility of the Priest class, he decides to meet with a potential candidate named Yuri at a military base.
key_moments: The protagonist recruits associates to map the Balter Mountains for the 6th main scenario.
The protagonist and his ally discuss the upcoming 'Alley Boss Academy' and the necessity of finding a qualified candidate.
The protagonist meets with Yuri at a military base to evaluate her potential for the recruitment project.
